TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Tsou, story: TsouNr-love-story-zhuang
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: pan no moso cihi ci oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: psn no moso ʦihi ʦi oko no hshoʦŋɨ.
S.FORM: pan no moso cihi ci oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: psn no moso ʦihi ʦi oko no hshoʦŋɨ.
S.TRANSL: 有一個男孩.
There was a boy.

S.FORM: moso n'a na'no kaebʉ ho mo uh no tonalisi ho noepohʉ na oko no mamespingi ho pespak'i.
S.PHON: moso nʔs nsʔno kseɓɨ ho mo uh no tonsɗisi ho noepohɨ ns oko no msmespiŋi ho pespskʔi.
S.FORM: moso n'a na'no kaebʉ ho mo uh no tonalisi ho noepohʉ na oko no mamespingi ho pespak'i.
S.PHON: moso nʔs nsʔno kseɓɨ ho mo uh no tonsɗisi ho noepohɨ ns oko no msmespiŋi ho pespskʔi.

TRANSL.notes: (他)喜歡去隔壁和一個女孩一起玩.

S.TRANSL: 喜歡去隔壁和一個女孩一起玩.

TRANSL.notes: (He) liked to go to his neighbor and played with a girl.

S.TRANSL: liked to go to his neighbor and played with a girl.

S.FORM: ina oko no mamespingi moso n'a na'no kaebʉ emʉm'ʉ no bʉvnʉ mav'ov'o ci bʉvnʉ.
S.PHON: ins oko no msmespiŋi moso nʔs nsʔno kseɓɨ emɨmʔɨ no ɓɨvnɨ msvʔovʔo ʦi ɓɨvnɨ.
S.FORM: ina oko no mamespingi moso n'a na'no kaebʉ emʉm'ʉ no bʉvnʉ mav'ov'o ci bʉvnʉ.
S.PHON: ins oko no msmespiŋi moso nʔs nsʔno kseɓɨ emɨmʔɨ no ɓɨvnɨ msvʔovʔo ʦi ɓɨvnɨ.
S.TRANSL: 那女孩非常喜歡種花,各式各樣的花.
The girl liked to grow flowers very much, all kinds of flowers.

S.FORM: ina nia nana to'tohʉ no oko no mamespingi osi n'a la eainca ta'u la peongcʉngci no mo mav'ov'o ci bʉvnʉ 'e pahpaesa ta maemoemo.
S.PHON: ins nis nsns toʔtohɨ no oko no msmespiŋi osi nʔs ɗs esinʦs tsʔu ɗs peoŋʦɨŋʦi no mo msvʔovʔo ʦi ɓɨvnɨ ʔe pshpsess ts msemoemo.
S.FORM: ina nia nana to'tohʉ no oko no mamespingi osi n'a la eainca ta'u la peongcʉngci no mo mav'ov'o ci bʉvnʉ 'e pahpaesa ta maemoemo.
S.PHON: ins nis nsns toʔtohɨ no oko no msmespiŋi osi nʔs ɗs esinʦs tsʔu ɗs peoŋʦɨŋʦi no mo msvʔovʔo ʦi ɓɨvnɨ ʔe pshpsess ts msemoemo.
S.TRANSL: 女孩心裡想,我要在家家戶戶旁邊種各式各樣的花.
The girl thought that "I would grow all kinds of flowers around every house.

S.FORM: mohcu la sio bankake.
S.PHON: mohʦu ɗs sio ɓsnkske.
S.FORM: mohcu la sio bankake.
S.PHON: mohʦu ɗs sio ɓsnkske.
S.TRANSL: 他們就長大了.
therefore grew up.

S.FORM: 'iama osi la ʉmnʉa no oko no hahocngʉ na mamespingi.
S.PHON: ʔisms osi ɗs ɨmnɨs no oko no hshoʦŋɨ ns msmespiŋi.
S.FORM: 'iama osi la ʉmnʉa no oko no hahocngʉ na mamespingi.
S.PHON: ʔisms osi ɗs ɨmnɨs no oko no hshoʦŋɨ ns msmespiŋi.
S.TRANSL: 出人意料的男孩愛上了女孩.
Unexpectedly, the girl was loved by the boy.

S.FORM: mohcu la maica mimimio poteli ma te pasunaeno na 'oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: mohʦu ɗs msiʦs mimimio poteɗi ms te pssunseno ns ʔoko no hshoʦŋɨ.
S.FORM: mohcu la maica mimimio poteli ma te pasunaeno na 'oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: mohʦu ɗs msiʦs mimimio poteɗi ms te pssunseno ns ʔoko no hshoʦŋɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 像這樣,(他們) 一起玩,那個男孩竟然還唱歌.

S.TRANSL: 像這樣, 一起玩,那個男孩竟然還唱歌.

TRANSL.notes: It was like this, (they) played, and unexpectedly the boy would sing.

S.TRANSL: It was like this, played, and unexpectedly the boy would sing.

S.FORM: 'iama lasi s'a ʉmnʉa ho osi ta'lʉi no oko no mamespingi na mo con ci pasunaeno.
S.PHON: ʔisms ɗssi sʔs ɨmnɨs ho osi tsʔɗɨi no oko no msmespiŋi ns mo ʦon ʦi pssunseno.
S.FORM: 'iama lasi s'a ʉmnʉa ho osi ta'lʉi no oko no mamespingi na mo con ci pasunaeno.
S.PHON: ʔisms ɗssi sʔs ɨmnɨs ho osi tsʔɗɨi no oko no msmespiŋi ns mo ʦon ʦi pssunseno.

TRANSL.notes: 出乎意料的 (他)喜歡那女孩,那女孩聽了那首歌.

S.TRANSL: 出乎意料的 喜歡那女孩,那女孩聽了那首歌.

TRANSL.notes: Unexpectedly,(he) loved the girl, and the girl heard a song.

S.TRANSL: Unexpectedly, loved the girl, and the girl heard a song.

S.FORM: osi cu pasunae mohcu asngʉcu pasunaeno maita'e.
S.PHON: osi ʦu pssunse mohʦu ssŋɨʦu pssunseno msitsʔe.
S.FORM: osi cu pasunae mohcu asngʉcu pasunaeno maita'e.
S.PHON: osi ʦu pssunse mohʦu ssŋɨʦu pssunseno msitsʔe.
S.TRANSL: 就一直這樣唱.
just kept singing like this.

S.FORM: te mainenu mohcu atavei mi'usnu no oko no mamespingi 'e oko no hahocngʉ ho eainca.
S.PHON: te msinenu mohʦu stsvei miʔusnu no oko no msmespiŋi ʔe oko no hshoʦŋɨ ho esinʦs.
S.FORM: te mainenu mohcu atavei mi'usnu no oko no mamespingi 'e oko no hahocngʉ ho eainca.
S.PHON: te msinenu mohʦu stsvei miʔusnu no oko no msmespiŋi ʔe oko no hshoʦŋɨ ho esinʦs.
S.TRANSL: 怎麼的後來男孩終於向女孩說,
Somehow the boy finally turned to the girl and said,

S.FORM: 'a ma te'o vcongʉ su?
S.PHON: ʔs ms teʔo vʦoŋɨ su?
S.FORM: 'a ma te'o vcongʉ su?
S.PHON: ʔs ms teʔo vʦoŋɨ su?
S.TRANSL: "跟我結婚好嗎?"
"May I marry you?"

S.FORM: eh mohcu maica.
S.PHON: eh mohʦu msiʦs.
S.FORM: eh mohcu maica.
S.PHON: eh mohʦu msiʦs.
S.TRANSL: 就像這樣.
Just like this.

S.FORM: isi cu engha ho eainca ma te'o vcongʉsu.
S.PHON: isi ʦu eŋhs ho esinʦs ms teʔo vʦoŋɨsu.
S.FORM: isi cu engha ho eainca ma te'o vcongʉsu.
S.PHON: isi ʦu eŋhs ho esinʦs ms teʔo vʦoŋɨsu.
S.TRANSL: 他就說, "跟我結婚好嗎?"
He just says, "may I marry you?"

S.FORM: osi cu eaeza ʉmnʉa no oko no mamespingi.
S.PHON: osi ʦu esezs ɨmnɨs no oko no msmespiŋi.
S.FORM: osi cu eaeza ʉmnʉa no oko no mamespingi.
S.PHON: osi ʦu esezs ɨmnɨs no oko no msmespiŋi.
S.TRANSL: 那女孩也喜歡他.
The girl also liked .

S.FORM: mici nana mipeohʉ mi'unu no peohna manci nana.
S.PHON: miʦi nsns mipeohɨ miʔunu no peohns msnʦi nsns.
S.FORM: mici nana mipeohʉ mi'unu no peohna manci nana.
S.PHON: miʦi nsns mipeohɨ miʔunu no peohns msnʦi nsns.
S.TRANSL: 好像往下看.
looked downward.

S.FORM: teolʉ no mo eon no eon no aaskiti no va'hʉ ci oko no mamespingi ho mongsi.
S.PHON: teoɗɨ no mo eon no eon no ssskiti no vsʔhɨ ʦi oko no msmespiŋi ho moŋsi.
S.FORM: teolʉ no mo eon no eon no aaskiti no va'hʉ ci oko no mamespingi ho mongsi.
S.PHON: teoɗɨ no mo eon no eon no ssskiti no vsʔhɨ ʦi oko no msmespiŋi ho moŋsi.
S.TRANSL: 怎麼有一個女孩在河邊哭.

TRANSL.notes: Somehow (they) saw a girl who was at the side of the river and cried.

S.TRANSL: Somehow saw a girl who was at the side of the river and cried.

S.FORM: ihe cu nana usa ho aiti ho tuocosi ho eainca manci s'a ac'o mongsi si eainca no oko no mamespingi 'a mio eon ta va'hʉ ho tufku.
S.PHON: ihe ʦu nsns uss ho siti ho tuoʦosi ho esinʦs msnʦi sʔs sʦʔo moŋsi si esinʦs no oko no msmespiŋi ʔs mio eon ts vsʔhɨ ho tufku.
S.FORM: ihe cu nana usa ho aiti ho tuocosi ho eainca manci s'a ac'o mongsi si eainca no oko no mamespingi 'a mio eon ta va'hʉ ho tufku.
S.PHON: ihe ʦu nsns uss ho siti ho tuoʦosi ho esinʦs msnʦi sʔs sʦʔo moŋsi si esinʦs no oko no msmespiŋi ʔs mio eon ts vsʔhɨ ho tufku.
S.TRANSL: 女孩說,"我在河邊洗衣服".
The girl said, "I washed clothes by the river."

S.FORM: isi hafa to chumu 'o mo coni ci yʉsʉ'u.
S.PHON: isi hsfs to ʦhumu ʔo mo ʦoni ʦi jɨsɨʔu.
S.FORM: isi hafa to chumu 'o mo coni ci yʉsʉ'u.
S.PHON: isi hsfs to ʦhumu ʔo mo ʦoni ʦi jɨsɨʔu.
S.TRANSL: "河水帶走我一件衣服".
"Water took away one of my clothes."

S.FORM: os'o na'na ucia ivaha eaa.
S.PHON: osʔo nsʔns uʦis ivshs ess.
S.FORM: os'o na'na ucia ivaha eaa.
S.PHON: osʔo nsʔns uʦis ivshs ess.
S.TRANSL: "我很想要把 拿回來".
"I wanted to get it back very much."

S.FORM: maene 'o oko no hahocngʉ isi cu aupciva peobanga 'e yʉsʉ ho.
S.PHON: msene ʔo oko no hshoʦŋɨ isi ʦu supʦivs peoɓsŋs ʔe jɨsɨ ho.
S.FORM: maene 'o oko no hahocngʉ isi cu aupciva peobanga 'e yʉsʉ ho.
S.PHON: msene ʔo oko no hshoʦŋɨ isi ʦu supʦivs peoɓsŋs ʔe jɨsɨ ho.
S.TRANSL: 那男孩於是趕快去追那被水帶走的衣服.
The boy hence in a hurry chased the clothes carried away by the water, and,

S.FORM: tasvoveia 'e isi hafa ta chumu ci ci yʉsʉ ci moso ngohcu.
S.PHON: tssvoveis ʔe isi hsfs ts ʦhumu ʦi ʦi jɨsɨ ʦi moso ŋohʦu.
S.FORM: tasvoveia 'e isi hafa ta chumu ci ci yʉsʉ ci moso ngohcu.
S.PHON: tssvoveis ʔe isi hsfs ts ʦhumu ʦi ʦi jɨsɨ ʦi moso ŋohʦu.
S.TRANSL: 拿回被水帶走漂走的的衣服.
took back the clothes which had been taken away by the water.

S.FORM: 'oko no mamespingi ina 'e 'oko no mamespingi ci moso tufku isi ʉmnʉa 'e hahocngʉ eainca 'a os'o na'no ʉmnʉa na su.
S.PHON: ʔoko no msmespiŋi ins ʔe ʔoko no msmespiŋi ʦi moso tufku isi ɨmnɨs ʔe hshoʦŋɨ esinʦs ʔs osʔo nsʔno ɨmnɨs ns su.
S.FORM: 'oko no mamespingi ina 'e 'oko no mamespingi ci moso tufku isi ʉmnʉa 'e hahocngʉ eainca 'a os'o na'no ʉmnʉa na su.
S.PHON: ʔoko no msmespiŋi ins ʔe ʔoko no msmespiŋi ʦi moso tufku isi ɨmnɨs ʔe hshoʦŋɨ esinʦs ʔs osʔo nsʔno ɨmnɨs ns su.
S.TRANSL: 那個洗衣服的女孩喜歡上那男孩,並且說,我很喜歡你.
The girl who washed clothes loves the boy and says, "I love you very much."

S.FORM: at'inghi 'e hahocngʉ isi esansana ho eainca 'a pan to os'o cu 'so ʉmnʉa ci 'oko no.
S.PHON: stʔiŋhi ʔe hshoʦŋɨ isi essnssns ho esinʦs ʔs psn to osʔo ʦu ʔso ɨmnɨs ʦi ʔoko no.
S.FORM: at'inghi 'e hahocngʉ isi esansana ho eainca 'a pan to os'o cu 'so ʉmnʉa ci 'oko no.
S.PHON: stʔiŋhi ʔe hshoʦŋɨ isi essnssns ho esinʦs ʔs psn to osʔo ʦu ʔso ɨmnɨs ʦi ʔoko no.
S.TRANSL: 但那男孩很清楚的說,我已經有喜歡的女孩子了.
But the boy clearly says, "there is already a girl who was loved by me."

S.FORM: 'o la na'no kaebʉ ho mo emʉm'ʉ to bʉvnʉ ko'ko eno o'a te'o tiova na su.
S.PHON: ʔo ɗs nsʔno kseɓɨ ho mo emɨmʔɨ to ɓɨvnɨ koʔko eno oʔs teʔo tiovs ns su.
S.FORM: 'o la na'no kaebʉ ho mo emʉm'ʉ to bʉvnʉ ko'ko eno o'a te'o tiova na su.
S.PHON: ʔo ɗs nsʔno kseɓɨ ho mo emɨmʔɨ to ɓɨvnɨ koʔko eno oʔs teʔo tiovs ns su.
S.TRANSL: 就是那個很愛種花的.因此我不會接受妳.
"The one who always likes growing flowers very much. Therefore, I will not accept you."

S.FORM: te'o ec'ʉha tan'e.
S.PHON: teʔo eʦʔɨhs tsnʔe.
S.FORM: te'o ec'ʉha tan'e.
S.PHON: teʔo eʦʔɨhs tsnʔe.
S.TRANSL: 我就說到這裡.
I just stop here.
